hypothesis: Augmenting STR-Bamba426M pretraining with a compact tokenized 3D geometric modality (binned pairwise interatomic distances and canonicalized key dihedral-angle tokens) added to the unified vocabulary will reduce the fine-tuned model's QM9 average MAE across quantum energy-related targets by at least 15% compared to the current multimodal model trained without 3D tokens.
